title: Tunisian Fritter Bread
description: A traditional Tunisian dessert with a twist, using fritters and rich almonds.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, confectioners' sugar, and salt.
Add chopped almonds and mix well.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and vanilla extract.
Add fritters to the egg mixture and mix until well combined.
Pour the egg mixture into the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Shape the dough into a round loaf.
Brush with vegetable oil and bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
Let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before slicing.
